title: 无标题文章
summary: In Android 17, apps targeting SDK 37 or higher will receive a new implementation of MessageQueue where the implementation is lock-free. https:// android-developers.googleblog. com/2026/02/under-hood-android-17s-lock-free.html
content:
In Android 17, apps targeting SDK 37 or higher will receive a new implementation of MessageQueue where the implementation is lock-free.

https://android-developers.googleblog.com/2026/02/under-hood-android-17s-lock-free.html
